title: TCW Launcher 0.3.4 Beta
summary: Restores compact launcher profile details and keeps browser overlays clean.
notes: Shows the Steam-linked trooper name, rank, unit, progression, and profile actions on the launcher card.
Refreshes main-menu overlay visibility when entering or leaving the server browser.
Ships the current website/backend public profile, community, store, server, audio, theme, and updater systems.
